summary: Added a read-only doctor envelope to the Jeffrey beads_rust #285 divergence capture harness so it can report br, capture-root, audit-log, and lock-timeout readiness without requiring a bead id or creating capture state.

proof.summary: 10/0 assertions: info advertises doctor schema, doctor emits jeff-bead-285-divergence-capture.doctor.v1 with mutates=false, invalid lock timeout fails cleanly, dry-run remains default, and no upstream auto-push verbs exist.
11/0 assertions: existing idempotency-key refusal, equals-form parsing, per-(key, bead_id) replay, tolerant audit parsing, and schema behavior are preserved.
Touched divergence-capture shell surfaces are ShellCheck clean.
Inventory regenerated; jeff-bead-285-divergence-capture.sh now reports doctor_subcommand_status=basic with score 625.

parent_state.reason: The broader doctor-mode wave remains open; this closes one scoped Jeffrey divergence capture surface only.
